deals.title: Add any easy (medium) hot drink for R25 with breakfast, sandwich or muffin
deals.tip: Use the Mugg & Bean app to earn cashback rewards. Valid at On the Move locations only — not regular Mugg & Bean.

deals.title: Coffee subscription — from R18 a cup
deals.tip: 5 coffees R99 (R20/cup) · 10 coffees R199 (R20/cup) · 15 coffees R269 (R18/cup). All easy (medium) sized. 30 days to redeem, once per day. Valid on: Cappuccino, Americano, Caffé Mocha, Caffé Latte, Filter Coffee. Download the Mugg & Bean app to buy or redeem.

deals.title: FNB eBucks — Kauai vouchers based on reward level
deals.tip: Level 1: any short iced or hot drink. Level 2: small (350ml) smoothie. Level 3: large (500ml) smoothie. Level 4: R100 voucher on any item. Level 5: R120 voucher on any item. Aspire: any small (350ml) smoothie.

deals.title: Free smoothie when you achieve your Vitality weekly goal
deals.tip: Note: using this reward will forfeit your weekly game board play to earn miles.

deals.title: Vitality weekly goal — add a meal from R60
deals.tip: Redeem your weekly goal as an instant reward and add a meal: selected Breakfast item from R60 · Sourdough Toastie from R70 · selected Meal item from R93.

deals.title: ClubCard cashback — up to 14% (stack for 25%)
deals.tip: Cashback paid on the 20th of every month. 1 point per R5 spent at Clicks or The Body Shop (2% back). Spend R600+ earn 4% back. Stack PayDay Savings offers for 10% extra = up to 14% total (excl. nappies & toilet paper). Pro tip: add Clicks to Discovery Vitality for up to 25% back. Must swipe ClubCard to earn or redeem. Points valid 12 months.

deals.title: Buy 2 get 1 free special
deals.tip: Bonus: buy Vitality products to stack and earn extra rewards — filter by Vitality on the Clicks website.

deals.title: FNB Easy Bundle — 99c loaf of bread at Pick n Pay, up to 4x a month
deals.tip: FNB Easy Bundle customers can pay just 99c for a loaf of brown or white bread from Pick n Pay bakeries, up to 4 times in a month.

deals.title: Free weekly Starbucks voucher (R850 off R875+) with FNB Virtual Card
deals.tip: Make at least 5 payments using your FNB Virtual Card (or FNB Pay/digital wallets) per week. Premier, Private Clients, Private Wealth and RMB Private Bank: must be reward level 2+. Aspire: qualify for eBucks with R150,000 in qualifying savings or a qualifying credit product. Also available for FNBy/FNBy Next customers 18+.

deals.title: #MakeMyMonday — coffee & hot chocolate from R22
deals.tip: R22 for 240ml · R27 for 350ml · R32 for 480ml. Every Monday only. Can only be redeemed on the Krispy Kreme app.

deals.title: #ChillerTuesday — two 350ml Chillers for 50% off
deals.tip: Every Tuesday only. Can only be redeemed on the Krispy Kreme app.

deals.title: Free Original Glazed doughnut — just for signing up to the loyalty app
deals.tip: Find the reward under the Offers tab after downloading the Krispy Kreme app.

deals.title: Birthday bonus — buy a dozen, get a dozen Original Glazed free
deals.tip: Download the app at least 48 hours before your birthday to qualify.
